steps.title: Evaluate the expression as a table
steps.content: Instead of expanding by hand, use Desmos to sample the expression. Enter a few $x$-values and define the output list from the original expression.

steps.title: Fit the coefficients
steps.content: Every answer has the form $x^4+qx^2+r$, so fit the sampled values with $y_1\sim a x_1^4+b x_1^2+c$. Desmos returns $a=1$, $b=23$, and $c=57$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The fitted expression is $x^4+23x^2+57$, which matches choice D. Choices A and B have the wrong $x^2$ coefficient, and choice C has the wrong constant, so choice D is correct.
